title.en: China-to-Fiji Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入斐济：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入斐濟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Fiji DNTMS standards administration, FCCC consumer and competition oversight, Energy Fiji Limited grid-connection review, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface requirements, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 240/415 V grid settings, and cyclone / salt-mist coastal derating — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与斐济DNTMS标准管理、FCCC消费者和竞争监管、Energy Fiji Limited并网审查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口要求、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 240/415 V电网参数及热带气旋/沿海盐雾降额——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與斐濟DNTMS標準管理、FCCC消費者和競爭監管、Energy Fiji Limited併網審查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面要求、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 240/415 V電網參數及熱帶氣旋/沿海鹽霧降額——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Fiji standards determination, FCCC compliance decision, EFL grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current DNTMS standards adoption, FCCC requirements, Energy Fiji Limited connection conditions, project-owner specifications, and coastal environmental design requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、斐济标准裁定、FCCC合规决定、EFL并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行DNTMS标准采纳、FCCC要求、Energy Fiji Limited接入条件、项目业主规格及沿海环境设计要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、斐濟標準裁定、FCCC合規決定、EFL併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行DNTMS標準採納、FCCC要求、Energy Fiji Limited接入條件、項目業主規格及沿海環境設計要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Fiji, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirm the applicable DNTMS standards or conformity route and any FCCC consumer-product obligations before import; (2) provide IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family; (3) provide IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence for EFL grid-connection review; (4) provide IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC evidence; (5) validate firmware and protection settings for Fiji's 240/415 V, 50 Hz network. Fiji has the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Cyclone exposure, high humidity, salt-mist corrosion, and thermal derating should be addressed in the project technical file.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口斐济时，主要实际差距包括：（1）进口前确认适用的DNTMS标准或合格评定路径及任何FCCC消费品义务；（2）提供覆盖具体逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（3）为EFL并网审查提供IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（4）提供IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC证据；（5）针对斐济240/415 V、50 Hz电网验证固件和保护设置。斐济与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基准。项目技术文件还应覆盖气旋暴露、高湿、盐雾腐蚀和热降额。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口斐濟時，主要實際差距包括：（1）進口前確認適用的DNTMS標準或合格評定路徑及任何FCCC消費品義務；（2）提供覆蓋具體逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（3）為EFL併網審查提供IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（4）提供IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC證據；（5）針對斐濟240/415 V、50 Hz電網驗證韌體和保護設置。斐濟與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基準。項目技術文件還應覆蓋氣旋暴露、高濕、鹽霧腐蝕和熱降額。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
